name: Blekinge County (Sweden)

colors.symbolism: the azure field of the Blekinge arms

description: A square blue flag charged centrally with a gold oak tree, the historic emblem of Blekinge.
history: The flag is the heraldic banner of the arms of Blekinge County, derived from the coat of arms of the historic province of Blekinge.

features.symbolism: the azure field of the historic Blekinge provincial arms
a gold oak tree on a blue field, the historic emblem of the province of Blekinge, referring to the oak forests of the region (long protected as a source of timber for the Swedish navy).
